product_overview: Electronic is a luxury e-commerce mobile and web app for browsing and buying electronics, fashion, perfumes, and watches. It provides a polished shopping experience with product discovery, cart and checkout, orders, wishlist, profile management, and localized Arabic/English support.
core_goals: Browse featured products, categories, banners, and campaign pages
Search and filter products to find relevant items quickly
View product details, reviews, and similar products before purchasing
Add products to cart and manage cart contents
Complete checkout with shipping address, promo code, and COD payment
Track orders and view order details and status updates
Save favorite products in a wishlist
Manage profile details, addresses, language, and account actions

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Users can access the app by logging in with email and password or creating a new account through registration.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit login form -> See home screen

Navigate to /register -> Enter first name -> Enter last name -> Enter phone number -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Confirm password -> Agree to terms -> Submit registration form -> Enter phone verification code -> See home screen

features.name: Home Browsing
features.description: Users can explore the storefront from the home screen using banners, categories, tabs, and product sections.
user_flows: Navigate to /home -> Browse banner carousels -> Browse category icons -> Browse product sections -> Open a product from the feed -> See product detail screen
Navigate to /home -> Switch between product filters -> Browse the filtered product grid -> Open a product from the grid -> See product detail screen
Navigate to /home -> Tap a banner -> See campaign page -> Open a product from the campaign products -> See product detail screen

features.name: Product Discovery Search
features.description: Users can search for products and refine results using category-based browsing and search-driven product lists.
user_flows: Navigate to /home -> Open search experience -> Enter a product query -> Wait for results to refresh -> Browse matching products -> Open a product -> See product detail screen
Navigate to /home -> Open categories experience -> Select a category -> Browse the category product grid -> Open a product -> See product detail screen

features.name: Product Detail
features.description: Users can inspect a product’s gallery, pricing, stock, specifications, reviews, and related products before acting on it.
user_flows: Navigate to a product detail page -> Browse product images -> Review product information -> Switch between description and specifications -> Browse reviews -> Browse similar products -> Return to browsing
Navigate to a product detail page -> Select a quantity -> Add the product to cart -> See cart badge update
Navigate to a product detail page -> Toggle wishlist status -> See the product saved or removed from wishlist
Navigate to a product detail page -> Enter a review rating -> Write a comment -> Submit the review -> See the review added to the product

features.name: Cart Management
features.description: Authenticated users can view their cart and manage products before checkout.
user_flows: Navigate to /cart -> Review cart items -> Update item quantities -> Remove an item -> See the cart total update
Navigate to /cart -> Review cart items -> Clear the cart -> See an empty cart state

features.name: Checkout and Order Placement
features.description: Users can complete purchase details, apply a promo code, choose COD payment, and place an order.
user_flows: Navigate to checkout -> Enter shipping name -> Enter shipping phone number -> Enter shipping address -> Enter shipping city -> Apply a promo code -> Review the updated total -> Select cash on delivery -> Place the order -> See the order success screen
Navigate to checkout -> Enter shipping details -> Review shipping cost and order summary -> Select cash on delivery -> Place the order -> See the order success screen

features.name: Orders
features.description: Users can view their order history, inspect order details, and follow order status progress.
user_flows: Navigate to the orders screen -> Browse the order list -> Open an order -> See order details, invoice, and status tracker
Navigate to the orders screen -> Review the empty state -> Go shopping -> Return to product browsing

features.name: Wishlist
features.description: Users can save products they like and review them later from a dedicated wishlist.
user_flows: Navigate to the wishlist screen -> Browse saved products -> Open a product -> See product detail screen
Navigate to a product detail page -> Toggle wishlist status -> See the product added to or removed from wishlist
Navigate to the wishlist screen -> Review the empty state

features.name: Profile and Account Settings
features.description: Users can view and edit profile information, manage addresses, switch language, and perform account actions.
user_flows: Navigate to the profile screen -> Review profile stats -> Open edit profile -> Update personal information -> Save changes -> See updated profile details
Navigate to the profile screen -> Open address management -> Add a new address -> Edit an existing address -> Delete an address -> Set a default address
Navigate to the profile screen -> Change the language -> See the interface update to the selected language
Navigate to the profile screen -> Log out -> Confirm the action -> Return to the login screen
Navigate to the profile screen -> Start account deletion -> Confirm the action -> Re-authenticate -> See the account removed flow

features.name: Notifications Placeholder
features.description: Users can open the notifications area and see an empty placeholder state with refresh behavior.
user_flows: Navigate to the notifications screen -> See the empty state -> Pull to refresh -> See the placeholder state again

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Add to Cart
features.description: Add a product to cart from product detail
